title: Nemesis Now Stormtrooper Wrecking Ball Hanging Ornament
features: Officially Licensed Original Stormtrooper Merchandise: Based on the original moulds that Andrew Ainsworth of Shepperton Design Studios produced, our range of Stormtrooper merchandise captures their character and are as close as it gets to the original film props
Stormtrooper Wrecking Ball Hanging Ornament: Here we can see a mischievous Stormtrooper grasping onto a chain, swinging recklessly on their disco like wrecking ball, ready to cause havoc
Sci-Fi Merchandise: Stormtrooper figurines are a staple for any fan of Sci-Fi movies
Cast in the Finest Resin & Expertly Hand-Painted: Cast in the finest resin before being expertly hand-painted this hanging ornament is sure to add a touch of fun to any Christmas tree
Original Stormtroopers: Our range of Stormtroopers are as close as it gets to the original film props
description: Product Description Known for their white suits and shocking aim, the Stormtrooper is easily noticeable by all! Here we can see a mischievous Stormtrooper grasping onto a chain, swinging recklessly on their disco like wrecking ball, ready to cause havoc. Cast in the finest resin before being expertly hand-painted this hanging ornament is sure to add a touch of fun to any Christmas tree. Safety Warning Warning: Keep out of reach of children. This product contains small parts that may pose a choking hazard. Do not hang near heat sources or open flames. Always use with caution and follow manufacturer's instructions.
